goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should depart from 'bishops stortford' and should 'leave after 15:00'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '6 people' and '2 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on thursday
The train should depart from bishops stortford and should leave after 15:00
Make sure you get arrival time and train ID
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 2 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
